arts.ttl: Big Kaoru Mitoma injury update emerges as Brighton prepare for Leicester City
arts.sum: Another injury blow for Brighton ahead of their Premier League clash against Leicester City

arts.ttl: Premier League official statement – Major change for Brighton vs Leicester at the Amex Stadium
arts.sum: Semi-automated offside technology (SAOT) will finally make its Premier League debut as Brighton welcome Leicester to the Amex Stadium this weekend.

arts.ttl: Director leading pursuit for Leicester City defender – Concrete interest, ready to seize opportunity
arts.sum: Bologna are keen on signing Leicester City’s Caleb Okoli in the summer window. The centre-back left Atalanta to join the Foxes last summer and could return to Serie A next season. That’s according to Tutto Atalanta, who cover Bologna’s interest in the Leicester player. Sporting director Giovanni Sartori spent eight years with La Dea before The post Director leading pursuit for Leicester City defender – Concrete interest, ready to seize opportunity appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leicester City manager latest as 'hurt' Ruud van Nistelrooy addresses future
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has reaffirmed his commitment to Leicester City this season but says talks over his long-term future have still not been held. Having previously been adamant he would not run away from City’s inevitable relegation, van Nistelrooy cast doubt over his immediate future in the wake of Monday’s 3-0 defeat to Newcastle by not offering a clear answer on his commitment.

arts.ttl: Brighton lineup vs. Leicester: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Brighton & Hove Albion could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Leicester lineup vs. Brighton: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Leicester City could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Brighton & Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Leicester City: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Brighton and Leicester, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Preview: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Leicester City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Brighton & Hove Albion and Leicester City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: 'End this cycle' - Ruud van Nistelrooy issues statement on his future ahead of Brighton clash
arts.sum: Under-pressure Leicester boss Ruud van Nistelrooy has vowed to fight on as he attempts to drag the promoted Foxes back from the brink of Premier League relegation.

arts.ttl: Two Leicester City changes possible at Brighton as double injury update delivered
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy may be forced to change his Leicester City team for the first time in five games after defender Wout Faes picked up a small injury. “We have Wout Faes who has a small injury,” van Nistelrooy said at his press conference on Thursday afternoon.
